title: Update Item's Group Using API
excerpt: I am trying to update the group that an item sits in using the mutate method in the API. I have tried the code below which won’t work as the group isn’t really a column. Does anyone know how I can update the group that a…

posts.author: ross.miller.ocean (Ross)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to update the group that an item sits in using the mutate method in the API. I have tried the code below which won’t work as the group isn’t really a column. Does anyone know how I can update the group that an item is in?

mutation {
change_multiple_column_values(item_id:0000, board_id:000, column_values: “{"group" : {"label" : "Done"}}”) {
id
}
}

posts.author: ross.miller.ocean (Ross)
posts.cookedHtml: Have just found the move_item_to_group function which resolves this.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
